title: Can Mergers Be Useful to Face Trade Liberalisation? The Role of Technology

summary.about: How mergers and trade liberalization affect firm profits in capital- and labor-intensive economies.
summary.audience: Competition authorities, trade economists and corporate-strategy researchers.
summary.method: Uses a two-country oligopolistic model with different technologies and cost structures.
summary.insights: Mergers raise firm profits, but gains from freer trade depend on whether higher output outweighs lower prices.
